testcase.name: Successful login with valid credentials using Playwright
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the login page using Playwright...............................undefined When I enter username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce" using Playwright.skipped And I click the login button using Playwright...............................skipped Then I should be logged in successfully using Playwright....................skipped And I should see the products page using Playwright.........................skipped
